lov_notes: ["Look for: should I, which should I choose, what do I do, tell me what is right, decide for me.", "Distinguish from NEUTRAL_FACT: PERSONAL_DIRECTION focuses on personal decisions or beliefs, not general information.", "Distinguish from GENERIC_INTENT: GENERIC_INTENT asks how to do something; PERSONAL_DIRECTION asks whether to do it or which option to pick.", "Distinguish from EMOTIONAL: EMOTIONAL expresses feelings; PERSONAL_DIRECTION asks for a decision or judgment on top of those feelings."]
intent_phrases: ["what should I do", "should I", "tell me what to choose", "which should I pick", "decide for me", "is it okay if I", "what is the right choice for me", "what do you think I should do"]
